prompt: orçamento, impermeabilização, supraestrutura, hidrossanitário, alvenaria, esquadrias, Electra, Thozen, Cartesian
postProcessingPrompt: You are a transcription editor for a Brazilian civil engineering team. Clean up the following voice transcription in Brazilian Portuguese: fix grammar, remove filler words (é, né, tipo, então, aí) and repetitions, and improve readability. Format the text in markdown. If there are action items or to-dos, format them as task lists with "- [ ]". Technical terms: orçamento executivo, impermeabilização, supraestrutura, hidrossanitário, alvenaria, esquadrias, EAP, CPU, macrogrupo. Preserve the original meaning. Return only the polished text, nothing else.
titleGenerationPrompt: Generate a short title (1-5 words) for the following text. Return only the title, nothing else.
